headline: Oppo’s Bubble is a thin round screen for taking rear camera selfies
summary: Oppo launched a new accessory for improved smartphone selfies. The Bubble is a thin, round screen for rear camera previews. It offers remote controls and better sensor utilization.

headline: Govee included a book on ‘White Supremacy’ in its website imagery
summary: Govee's product imagery sparked controversy. A book titled "White Supremacy" was spotted in a lifestyle shot. An eagle-eyed reader brought the oversight to attention.

headline: Jony Ive’s Ferrari looks nothing like a Ferrari
summary: Ferrari unveiled a "weird" new EV designed by Jony Ive. The design departs drastically from traditional Ferrari aesthetics. Ferrari is notably late to the electric vehicle market.

headline: Nvidia has retired its GeForce Control Panel app after 20 years
summary: Nvidia has officially retired its GeForce Control Panel app. The app is replaced by the newer Nvidia App. This change comes two years after Nvidia announced the transition.

headline: What to Expect From PlayStation’s State of Play June 2026
summary: PlayStation's State of Play is scheduled for June 2. Fans anticipate reveals for Marvel's Wolverine and a new God of War. Expect exciting game announcements and surprises.

headline: Pope Leo Quotes Gandalf From The Lord of the Rings as He Issues Stark AI Warning
summary: Pope Leo issued a strong warning about Artificial Intelligence. He called for urgent regulation of AI development. The Pope notably quoted Gandalf from The Lord of the Rings.

headline: PS Plus Extra and Premium Get Destiny 2 on Its Final Content Update Day
summary: Destiny 2 Legacy Collection arrives on PS Plus Extra and Premium. This launch coincides with its final content update. The Final Shape expansion will be included for subscribers.

headline: Jackass: Best and Last Stars Confirmed to Attend IGN Live 2026
summary: Several "Jackass" stars are confirmed for IGN Live 2026. Steve-O, Wee Man, Poopies, and Jasper will attend. They will promote their new movie, "Jackass: Best and Last."

headline: Sentences of boys spared custody over rape referred to Court of Appeal
summary: The Prime Minister referred sentences to the Court of Appeal. This concerns boys spared custody for rape in Hampshire. The decision follows public scrutiny of the ruling.

headline: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
summary: Iran denounced US strikes as a "gross violation" of ceasefire. The attacks occurred during peace talks in Doha. Iranian and Qatari negotiators were present.

headline: 'Bullying' and 'overbearing' behaviour behind abrupt BP chairman removal
summary: BP's chairman was abruptly removed from his position. Reports cite "bullying" and "overbearing" behavior. BP declined to comment on the specific reasons.

headline: Three teens dead after being in water at beauty spots
summary: Three teenagers tragically died in separate water incidents. The fatalities occurred across England on Bank Holiday Monday. Authorities urge caution near natural water bodies.
